vllm.title: Specify python package dependencies in requirements.txt
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #56
This PR specifies the python package dependencies in requirements.txt. The file will be parsed by setup.py.
Why not directly specify them in setup.py?
For those who build CacheFlow from source, the dependencies (or at least pytorch) should be installed BEFORE executing pip install .. This
